comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Klang (2-knob, RING MOD only v1). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 5-knob desktop-preview manifest (which also has the frequency-shifter modes, deferred on pedal). Stereo spread is baked.
gid_comment: 0x01 = Dynamics category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DYN_. All custom effects grouped under Dynamics.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
